creator: lightside@gmx.com
text:
Created attachment 185328
Proposed patch (since 412348 revision)

Patch to update math/gnumeric port from 1.12.28 to 1.12.35 version.

- Add dependencies, which found by stage-qa
- Adapt pkg-plist

Look following links for changes:
http://www.gnumeric.org/announcements/1.12/gnumeric-1.12.29.html
http://www.gnumeric.org/announcements/1.12/gnumeric-1.12.30.html
http://www.gnumeric.org/announcements/1.12/gnumeric-1.12.31.html
http://www.gnumeric.org/announcements/1.12/gnumeric-1.12.32.html
http://www.gnumeric.org/announcements/1.12/gnumeric-1.12.33.html
http://www.gnumeric.org/announcements/1.12/gnumeric-1.12.34.html
http://www.gnumeric.org/announcements/1.12/gnumeric-1.12.35.html

The build was tested on FreeBSD 10.3 amd64.
